full_text:
Liu Ling (Bolun) 刘伶 (伯倫)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Ling (刘伶), styledBolun (伯倫), was born in Pei country [沛国] in An Hui. One of the Seven Sages of the Bamboo Grove. Liu Ling was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty. Liu Ling lived during the Jin Dynasty period of Chinese history.
